g.text: From mydevice_poll to nginx: The Full .poll Stack

div.p: 🟣 Your driver code 🔵 VFS / kernel infra 🟢 epoll subsystem 🟡 Userspace framework ⬜ Other .poll impls 🔴 Hot path / wakeup

g.text: L5 — Userspace: nginx / Node.js Event Loop
Adds wqh to poll_table subscription list
0x00 | poll_queue_proc | _qproc // fn ptr: called by poll_wait
0x50 | wait_queue_entry| wait // our entry in driver wq
/* called by poll_wait() for each wait queue */
Called when wake_up_interruptible fires in driver!
0x58 | rb_root_cached | rbr // all monitored fds (O(log n))
1. if rdllist non-empty → collect events → return
O(1) per event — no re-scanning all fds!
50,000+ simultaneous connections — one thread — because epoll is O(1) per event
